'''Hunti Pereg''' was a skilled [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] who, along with five others, was hired to capture [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] during the last decades of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. [[Gender/Legends|He]] was [[Stun/Legends|incapacitated]] while throwing [[Thermal detonator/Legends|thermal detonators]] at the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]. [[Granta Omega]] posed as an injured Hunti Pereg to trap the Jedi into going back to their ship, but later the two [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] ran into the real Hunti Pereg. While fighting Obi-Wan, Pereg's detonator [[Death/Legends|killed]] him by exploding in conducting [[Water/Legends|water]].
